connectors.name: LCD RS
connectors.description: Connect to the LCD module 'RS' pin

connectors.name: LCD E
connectors.description: Connect to the LCD module 'E' pin

connectors.name: Serial In
connectors.description: This is the serial input used to control the FRM010. Connect to a digital output of your controller via a 1K resistor or via a 22K resistor when connected directly to a PC or to an input signal whose voltage is greater than the power supply

connectors.name: Reset
connectors.description: Connect via a 4K7 resistor to the positive rail of the power supply in your circuit. This pin must be connected via the 4K7 resistor or the FRM010 will not operate correctly. This pin can also be connected to a switch to 0V (ground) to provide a manual 'reset button' for the FRM010

connectors.name: 0V
connectors.description: Connect to the 0V (ground) of the power supply in your circuit

connectors.name: LCD D4
connectors.description: Connect to the LCD module 'D4' pin

connectors.name: LCD D5
connectors.description: Connect to the LCD module 'D5' pin

connectors.name: LCD D6
connectors.description: Connect to the LCD module 'D6' pin

connectors.name: LCD D7
connectors.description: Connect to the LCD module 'D7' pin

connectors.name: JP1 - Welcome Message selection
connectors.description: Connect this pin to 0V (ground) to display a welcome message. Leave this pin unconnected to not display the welcome message

connectors.name: JP2 - Baud Rate selection
connectors.description: Connect this pin to 0V (ground) to select 9600 baud operation. Leave the pin unconnected to select 2400 baud operation

connectors.name: JP3 - Polarity selection
connectors.description: Connect this pin to 0V (ground) when connected directly to a PC or controlled by a PICAXE using an 'N' baud rate. Leave this pin unconnected when controlled by a PICAXE using a 'T' baud rate

connectors.name: JP4 - Number of Lines selection
connectors.description: Connect this pin to 0V (ground) for a single line display. Leave the pin unconnected for a two line display

connectors.name: +V
connectors.description: Connect to the positive rail of the power supply in your circuit

connectors.name: XTAL
connectors.description: Connect this pin to a 4MHz resonator. Without a resonator fitted the FRM010 will not function.

connectors.name: XTAL
connectors.description: Connect this pin to a 4MHz resonator. Without a resonator fitted the FRM010 will not function.

connectors.name: LED
connectors.description: Connect this pin to a LED plus current limiting resistor to 0V (ground) of your power supply to indicate that communications are being received

connectors.name: LCD PWR
connectors.description: Power for the LCD module. Connect to the LCD module 'VCC' pin
